content: Remote OK Designer Thorne <strong>Department: </strong>Marketing<br><br><strong>Location: </strong>Remote<br><br><strong>Compensation: </strong>$75,000 - $80,000 / year<br><br><strong>Description<br><br></strong><strong>At Thorne, we work to deliver high-quality, science-backed solutions to empower individuals to take a proactive approach to their well-being. Each day begins with a mission to help others discover and achieve their best health. We count on our team members to challenge and push the boundaries to make that happen. At Thorne, youâll be joining a team of more than 750 passionate individuals committed to our cause of providing superior health solutions at every age and life stage.<br><br></strong>The Designer is a member of the Creative Team, partnering across the organization to bring<br><br>ideas to life through thoughtful, strategic design. This role supports both internal and consumer marketing initiatives by<br><br>creating forward-thinking visual solutions that strengthen and evolve the Thorne brand across all touchpoints.<br><br><strong>Responsibilities<br><br></strong><strong>Design Execution &amp; Brand Expression<br><br></strong><ul><li>Develop high-quality, on-brand design across print and digital channels, including campaigns, email, social, and misc. marketing collateral.</li><li>Create compelling visual assets for direct mail, catalogs, sell sheets, and promotional materials.</li><li>Design engaging graphics for digital channels, including email and social media.</li><li>Maintain a high standard of craft, layout, typography, and visual storytelling across all deliverables.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Brand Stewardship &amp; Consistency<br><br></strong><ul><li>Apply and uphold Thorneâs brand guidelines to ensure a cohesive and elevated visual identity across all touchpoints.</li><li>Contribute to the evolution of the brand by bringing fresh, thoughtful creative solutions.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Creative Development &amp; Collaboration<br><br></strong><ul><li>Contribute creative design solutions to support relevant campaigns and marketing initiatives.</li><li>Collaborate closely with Creative, Brand, and cross-functional partners to deliver effective, high-quality work.</li><li>Partner with copywriters and stakeholders to ensure cohesive execution of messaging and design.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Execution &amp; Continuous Improvement<br><br></strong><ul><li>Manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environment while maintaining quality and attention to detail.</li><li>Stay current with design trends, tools, and best practices to keep creative work fresh and relevant.</li><li>Embrace new tools, resources, and workflows that improve team efficiency and output.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Team Contribution &amp; Development<br><br></strong><ul><li>Participate in critiques, working sessions, and team discussions to contribute ideas and feedback.</li><li>Seek and incorporate feedback to continuously improve creative output and performance.<br><br></li></ul><strong>What You Need<br><br></strong><strong>Required Experience &amp; Skills:<br><br></strong><ul><li>Bachelorâs degree in graphic design, Visual Communication, or related field, or equivalent experience.</li><li>5+ years of professional design experience (in-house or agency).</li><li>Experience designing across digital and print marketing channels.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Competencies:<br><br></strong><ul><li>Creative thinking and problem-solving</li><li>Strong visual design and attention to detail</li><li>Brand awareness and consistency</li><li>Collaboration and communication skills</li><li>Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines</li><li>Adaptability in a fast-paced environment</li><li>Ability to present and explain design decisions clearly<br><br></li></ul><strong>Tools &amp; Technical Skills:<br><br></strong><ul><li>Adobe Creative Cloud (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)</li><li>Figma</li><li>Ability to work within digital design systems and template (email, social, web)</li><li>Knowledge of typography, layout, and visual hierarchy</li><li>Experience preparing files for print and digital production</li><li>Familiarity with motion/video tools is a plus<br><br></li></ul><strong>What We Offer<br><br></strong><ul><li>Competitive compensation</li><li>100% company-paid medical, dental, and vision insurance coverage for employees</li><li>Company-paid short- and long-term disability insurance</li><li>Company- paid life insurance</li><li>401k plan with employer matching contributions up to 4%</li><li>Gym membership reimbursement</li><li>Monthly allowance of Thorne supplements</li><li>Paid time off, volunteer time off and holiday leave</li><li>Training, professional development, and career growth opportunities<br><br></li></ul>Thorne is the leader in science-backed health and wellness solutions committed to helping individuals live healthier longer. As the top recommended clinical brand by healthcare practitioners, Thorne offers a comprehensive range of products including nutritional supplements and health tests designed to meet the unique needs of individuals at every stage of life. Founded in 1984, Thorne products are formulated with the highest-quality ingredients, supported by clinical research, and rigorously tested to ensure purity, potency, and efficacy. Thorne is trusted by 47,000+ health-care professionals, thousands of professional athletes, more than 100 professional sports teams, multiple U.S. National Teams, and more than five million consumers.
